Acid Mothers Temple & Melting Paraiso U..about:
Acid Mothers Temple & Melting Paraiso U.F.O
Acid Mothers Temple & Melting Paraiso U.F.O has always held a deep dedication and devotion towards improvised music. From psychedelic freakouts to Stockhausen-inspired noise, from minimalism to 70’s prog rock; to go from Black Sabbath all the way to Terry Riley, Acid Mothers Temple is your best gateway drug.
Now with a history of over two decades, and a discography of over one hundred releases, here is one killer of an album more for you! Recorded at Lodge Studio in September 2017 and continued at Acid Mothers Temple in October 2021, Demi-Demoniac Daemoog is a monolith made out of wild and bubbly synthesizers topped with totally "out there" kind of fuzz freakism.
Acid Mothers Temple & Melting Paraiso U..credits:
released January 3, 2022
Acid Mothers Temple & The Melting Paraiso U.F.O. at the time of this recording were :
Kawabata Makoto : guitar, synthesizer, speed guru
Higashi Hiroshi : synthesizer, fishing god
Mitsuko☆Tabata : moog guitar, voice, maratab
Satoshima Nani : drums, synthesizer, another dimension
Wolf : bass, space & time
Recorded at Lodge Studio (London) on 21st - 22nd September 2017
and at Acid Mothers Temple on 11th - 12th October 2021
Produced and mixed by Kawabata Makoto
Sponsored by Moog Lab
Special thanks to Tom Relleen and Morgan Peckosh
Layout and CD design by Jani Hirvonen
